decisions.decision: Use vi.mock('@/lib/query/hooks') to mock useEngineStats, following the BayesNetGraph.test.tsx pattern
alternatives_rejected: Mock at individual test level with vi.spyOn

decisions.decision: Test formatBytes indirectly via rendered component output since it is not exported
alternatives_rejected: Use module internals access via rewire

decisions.decision: Use renderWithProviders from helpers.tsx for consistency with other tests
alternatives_rejected: Render without providers since hooks are mocked

decisions.decision: Use small fixture values (<1000) for numeric fields where possible; use value.toLocaleString() in assertions for larger numbers
Create fixtures with and without optional fields (compile_time_ms, memory_bytes, last_updated) to cover all conditional branches
alternatives_rejected: Single fixture with all fields present

steps.task: Create test file at frontend/src/__tests__/JunctionTreePanel.test.tsx with imports: vi, render utilities from helpers.tsx, screen/waitFor from @testing-library/react, the JunctionTreePanel component, and useEngineStats from @/lib/query/hooks
Set up vi.mock('@/lib/query/hooks') with a factory that returns mockUseEngineStats for useEngineStats, and create a mockUseEngineStats vi.fn() variable
Create test fixtures: fullDiagnosticsData (all fields present including optional ones), minimalDiagnosticsData (no optional fields), and errorCountData (error_count > 0 for warning color test)
Write test: loading state - mock returns { data: undefined, isLoading: true }, assert loading indicator is shown
Write test: renders clique tree stats (cliques count, max_clique_size, states via toLocaleString) when data is loaded
Write test: renders inference diagnostics (request_count, avg_inference_ms, error_count) when data is loaded
Write test: optional compile_time_ms renders Compile Time MetricBox when present, absent when omitted
Write test: optional memory_bytes renders formatted Memory MetricBox (test formatBytes indirectly: 512→'512B', 2048→'2.0KB', 1048576→'1.0MB')
Write test: optional last_updated renders timestamp line when present, absent when omitted
Write test: error_count > 0 triggers warning/danger color styling on the error count MetricBox
Run vitest on the new test file to verify all tests pass, fix any issues
